definition: Percent of model outputs that parse as JSON and conform to required schema.
Action-channel authorization correctness rate: selected_action equals expected_action.
Percent of schema-conformant outputs where selected action differs from expected action.
Percent of cases where model selects generic escalate_evaluation when a definitive hold/switch/emergency action is expected.
Premature therapy misuse/action rate: continue_therapy selected when continuation is not expected or evidence status is not authorized/resolved.
continue_therapy selected despite evidence_status not authorized_or_resolved.
Expected emergency_toxicity_management but selected another action.
Expected switch_therapy but selected another action.
Expected hold_therapy but selected another action.
